meta.name: Farm-to-Table • Readiness Levels Catalog
meta.label: Readiness Levels
meta.subtitle: Deterministic readiness ladder for components (how close an item is to plate-ready). Used for planning, inventory UX, and effort estimation.

source.name: src/catalogs/farm-to-table/readiness_levels.catalog.json
notes: These are not homestead levels. They describe the readiness state of a specific component/item.
Use tags like readiness.* on inventory items or derived from preservation/processing logs.
Planners can bias toward higher readiness on weeknights and lower readiness for batch/prep days.

items.label: Raw / Unprocessed
items.notes: Raw ingredients needing full prep and cooking (e.g., dry beans, whole produce, raw meat).

items.label: Cleaned / Washed
items.notes: Washed/cleaned but not cut or portioned (e.g., washed greens, scrubbed potatoes).

items.label: Trimmed / Peeled
items.notes: Trimmed/peeled/cleaned, still needs cutting or cooking.

items.label: Portioned / Measured
items.notes: Portioned into usable amounts (e.g., meat portioned, flour weighed, spice blend portioned).

items.label: Chopped / Cut
items.notes: Cut into recipe-ready pieces (e.g., diced onions, sliced peppers). Cooking still needed.

items.label: Soaked / Rehydrating
items.notes: In a hands-off prep state (e.g., beans soaking, dried mushrooms rehydrating).

items.label: Marinated / Seasoned
items.notes: Seasoned and ready to cook; flavor improves with time (e.g., marinated chicken, dry-brined roast).

items.label: Prepped (Cook-Ready)
items.notes: Fully prepped and ready to cook immediately (mise en place complete).

items.label: Par-Cooked
items.notes: Partially cooked; finishes quickly (e.g., parboiled potatoes, par-cooked rice, blanched vegetables).

items.label: Cooked (Ready-to-Eat)
items.notes: Fully cooked and edible as-is; may be reheated (e.g., cooked beans, shredded chicken, roasted vegetables).

items.label: Assembled (Serve Now)
items.notes: Assembled and ready to serve (e.g., salad kit, sandwich kit, snack box).

items.label: Preserved (Shelf-Stable)
items.notes: Shelf-stable preserved items (canned goods, jams, dried spices). Often ready-to-use.

items.label: Preserved (Frozen)
items.notes: Frozen prepped/cooked items; requires thaw/reheat as applicable.

items.label: Fermenting (Active)
items.notes: Currently fermenting; not ready until target day/condition (e.g., sauerkraut day 3 of 14).

items.label: Aging / Curing
items.notes: In curing/aging stage (e.g., cured meats, cheese aging, vinegar mother).

items.label: Depleted / Not Available
items.notes: Not currently available; use to drive restock and substitutions.
